response.justification: Candidate's modern C++ experience is minimal and dated (roughly 7 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015), with no Rust experience and no navigation/routing background. Recent 10+ years are primarily TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which do not satisfy the C++/Rust primary requirement for a routing tiling pipeline role. Some adjacent strengths (GIS work via GISCollective, high-throughput microservices at Sociomantic) exist but are not sufficient to offset the core language and domain gap.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS exposure through GISCollective and Green Map work
High-throughput distributed-systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Strong Linux, testing discipline (TDD), and polyglot systems background
concerns: Modern C++ experience is brief and over a decade old; no Rust experience
No navigation, routing, or map-tile pipeline experience
Primary recent stack (TS/Node.js) misaligned with C++-first role
